·3h
I got more graphic novels at the library yesterday. After ten days of reading a memoir, my first thought was 'I miss pictures' so gotta slow dose the reading books without pictures for a bit I guess? I got some fiction books that don't have pictures too, but yeah. I needed the artsy inspo.

‪LA Dork‬ ‪@ladork.bsky.social‬
·5h
In 1963, kidnapper Barry Keenan used the top-floor bar of the Holiday Inn off the 405 as a lookout to make sure Frank Sinatra dropped off a $240K ransom near Sepulveda & Montana. Frankie Jr. was then let out at Mulholland Bridge, where he made it to mom Nancy Sinatra Sr's. house.
‪Forbes‬
 ‪@forbes.com‬
·8h
Mikaela Shiffrin’s Gold Medal: The Road To Redemption
Mikaela Shiffrin’s Gold Medal: The Road To Redemption
At exactly the moment when a few billion armchair coaches all leaned in to watch, Mikaela Shiffrin leaned forward—and won.  Not narrowly. She won by a “Grand Canyon” mile
www.forbes.com
‪Toronto Boris‬ ‪@torontoboris.bsky.social‬

‪Georgina Kent‬ ‪@georginadoodles.bsky.social‬
·1d
I painted this Great Spotted Woodpecker around 3 years ago. At the time it was the best painting I’d done and I was sure it’d sell really well. To this day, I haven’t sold a single print of it 😅 Just goes to show, you never can tell what’ll be popular :) #watercolours#birdart 🪶
‪Tim Thomas‬ ‪@timofnewbury.bsky.social‬
·13h
Enjoying every sentence in Shadow Ticket by Thomas Pynchon set in 1932. There’s a lot of American slang. Chapter 16 - … Union Station … Rain in Chicago today, a downbeat hush. Yard bulls in slickers moving among the gaunt steel monsters, rain brightened rails, treacherous footing.

‪MikeroneNiner‬ ‪@mikeroneniner.bsky.social‬
·15h
I’m sat here at the waters edge. Sipping coffee , taking in the view,with the dogs & I’m reminded how lucky I am. Watching your bike ride videos takes me all over the world. Incredible places I will never go. If you wonder ever why you make them. Well look right here. They, you. are appreciated. ♥️🚲
‪London & Southeast🔅‬ ‪@thesnowdreamer.bsky.social‬
·5h
A spring feel in the air… Locally got to 14.3C around 3pm new warmest day of year until next week.

Heartbreaking finish this morning. Team Canada left everything on the ice in an incredible gold medal game. Across Courtenay–Alberni and Vancouver Island, people were up early cheering together. Thank you to every player who wore the maple leaf with pride. You inspired us all.
